← Nexus Sunday, April 19

Windy Hill Preserve

⏱ 5.0h activity 🕗 9:00 AM start 🌤 Partly cloudy with morning fog, 68°F
✓ Good conditions ✓ Works for everyone ✓ Easy drive
Why This Plan

Perfect spring weather and moderate terrain for the whole family.

Your Day

Depart by 9am and reach the trailhead in under an hour. The ridge offers sweeping views of the bay.

Day at a Glance
9:00 AM
Arrive at Windy Hill Preserve
2:00 PM
Activity ends
Before you go
  • Check trail/route conditions before departing
  • Pack food and water for the full activity

Emergency: Call 911 in an emergency

Backup Option
Windy Hill Preserve (Relaxed)
A more relaxed alternative if you'd like something lower-key.

How confident are you in this plan?

After Your Trip
